title: Implement Project Initiation Feature
description: Develop AI-powered project initiation feature, including project scope definition, resource allocation, and timeline creation.
acceptance_criteria: Project initiation feature is fully functional and integrated with task management feature.

title: Develop Task Management Feature
description: Implement automated task assignment and tracking feature.
acceptance_criteria: Task management feature is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

title: Implement Collaboration Tools
description: Develop integrated collaboration tools for team members to share knowledge and ideas.
acceptance_criteria: Collaboration tools are fully functional and integrated with task management feature.

title: Develop Reporting and Analytics Feature
description: Implement basic project reporting and analytics feature.
acceptance_criteria: Reporting and analytics feature is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

title: Implement User Authentication and Authorization
description: Develop user authentication and authorization feature using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
acceptance_criteria: User authentication and authorization feature is fully functional and secure.

title: Develop Database Schema
description: Design and implement database schema for project data storage.
acceptance_criteria: Database schema is fully functional and optimized for project data storage.

title: Implement AI/ML Model
description: Develop AI-powered project management model using TensorFlow.js.
acceptance_criteria: AI/ML model is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

title: Develop Frontend UI Components
description: Implement UI components for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend UI components are fully functional and visually appealing.

title: Implement API Endpoints
description: Develop API endpoints for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
acceptance_criteria: API endpoints are fully functional and secure.

title: Develop Testing Framework
description: Implement testing framework for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
acceptance_criteria: Testing framework is fully functional and covers all project features.

title: Implement Security Measures
description: Develop security measures for project data storage and API endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Security measures are fully functional and secure.

title: Develop Deployment Script
description: Implement deployment script for project deployment to production environment.
acceptance_criteria: Deployment script is fully functional and automates project deployment.

title: Implement Monitoring and Logging
description: Develop monitoring and logging feature for project performance and errors.
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring and logging feature is fully functional and provides insights on project performance.

title: Develop Backup and Recovery
description: Implement backup and recovery feature for project data storage.
acceptance_criteria: Backup and recovery feature is fully functional and ensures data integrity.

title: Implement Load Balancing
description: Develop load balancing feature for project performance and scalability.
acceptance_criteria: Load balancing feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

title: Implement Caching
description: Develop caching feature for project performance and scalability.
acceptance_criteria: Caching feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

title: Implement Content Delivery Network (CDN)
description: Develop CDN feature for project performance and scalability.
acceptance_criteria: CDN feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

title: Implement Web Application Firewall (WAF)
description: Develop WAF feature for project security and performance.
acceptance_criteria: WAF feature is fully functional and ensures project security and performance.

title: Implement Disaster Recovery
description: Develop disaster recovery feature for project data storage and performance.
acceptance_criteria: Disaster recovery feature is fully functional and ensures project data storage and performance.

title: Implement Compliance and Governance
description: Develop compliance and governance feature for project security and performance.
acceptance_criteria: Compliance and governance feature is fully functional and ensures project security and performance.
